title: Polymer Digital Chests
description: Digital Chest adds advanced, server-side storage that works with vanilla clients (thanks to Polymer). Build linked storage networks, search/sort huge inventories, automate input/output,
body:
# 📦 Digital Chest (Fabric 1.21.11)

## 🚀 Next-Gen Storage, Zero Client-Side Hassle

**Digital Chest** redefines server-side storage by bridging the gap between powerful logistics and the vanilla experience. Built on the **Polymer** framework, it delivers a high-tech storage suite that requires **no client-side mod installation**.

Players can join with a standard vanilla client and immediately interact with tiered chests, shared networks, and advanced sorting GUIs.

---

## 💎 The Evolution of Storage

Forget cluttered basements filled with wooden crates. **Digital Chest** introduces a tiered progression system that scales with your resources.

Start with the expanded capacity of **Metal Chests** (**Iron, Gold, and Diamond**) and graduate to the **Digital Chest**: a high-density unit that can be upgraded from **Iron** all the way to **Netherite**, which offers **unlimited storage**.

> **Pro Tip:** Need to reorganize? Apply an **Ender Pearl upgrade** to any chest to enable **Inventory Retention**, allowing you to break and move your entire storage setup without spilling a single item.

---

## 🎨 Global Connectivity: Dye-Linked Channels

The true power of Digital Chest is its **Color Linking** system. By applying dyes to your chests, you create private, frequency-based networks.

- **Shared Inventories:** Every chest on the same color channel shares the exact same inventory.
- **Remote Synchronization:** Build a deposit station at your mob farm and access those items instantly at your main base.
- **Team Collaboration:** Coordinate with your faction by sharing specific color channels for communal resources.

---

## ⚙️ Advanced Automation: The Quantum Hopper

Take your technical builds to the next level with the **Quantum Hopper**, a dedicated block that interfaces directly with your color channel network.

### Three Operating Modes
- **INPUT (Green):** Extract items into the network
- **EXTRACT (Orange):** Pull items out of the network
- **STOCK (Cyan):** Keep a target inventory precisely filled

### Precision Filtering
- Utilize the built-in **9-slot whitelist filter** to control exactly what enters or leaves your system.

### Scaling Transfer Rates
Your automation speed upgrades with your storage tier:

- **Iron:** 1 item / 8 ticks
- **Netherite:** up to 64 items / 2 ticks

---

## 🔐 Security & Cross-Dimensional Access

Whether you are collaborating with a faction or guarding your personal loot, Digital Chest gives you complete control.

### Private Chest System
Right-click any linked chest with a **Digital Key** to privatize the channel. You can easily grant or revoke access using a whitelist GUI that displays online player heads.

### Remote Access
The **Soulbound Digital Key** lets you remotely open the last Digital Chest you interacted with in the same dimension.

### The Quantum Key
Upgrade your Soulbound Digital Key to a **Quantum Key** using a **Netherite Template** to unlock **cross-dimensional access**. It force-loads the target chunk so you can pull your gear from the Overworld while exploring the End.

---

## 🖥️ A Smarter Interface & Built-in Crafting

The custom GUI is designed for speed and clarity. Instead of hunting through rows of items:

- **Integrated Search Bar:** Quickly find what you need using anvil-based text input filtering
- **Smart Sort:** Organize by type, count, or mod origin *(settings persist per-player)*
- **Deposit All:** Instantly move matching items from your inventory into the chest
- **Toggleable Holograms:** Project item counts and types directly above the chest for at-a-glance information

### Digital Crafting GUI
No need to constantly back out of your storage to craft.

The integrated **3x3 grid** features:
- Seamless drag-and-drop functionality
- Live recipe resolution
- Shift-click to craft-all directly within the interface

---

## 🧾 Recipes

| Result | Ingredients | Type |
|---|---|---|
| **Iron Chest** | 8× Iron Ingot + Chest | Shaped |
| **Gold Chest** | 8× Gold Ingot + Iron Chest | Shaped |
| **Diamond Chest** | 8× Diamond + Gold Chest | Shaped |
| **Digital Chest** | 6× Obsidian + 2× Diamond + Ender Chest | Shaped |
| **Quantum Hopper** | 2× Ender Pearl + Ender Eye + 3× Diamond + Hopper | Shaped |
| **Digital Key** | Trial Key + Ender Pearl + 3× Iron Ingot | Shaped |
| **Quantum Key** | Netherite Template + Digital Key + Netherite Ingot | Smithing |

> *(All items can also be found in the custom **"Digital Chest"** creative tab!)*

---

## 🛠️ Technical Specifications

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Engine** | Fabric Loader 1.21.11 |
| **Dependencies** | Fabric API, Polymer (Server-side) |
